// Sokoban for Apple 1 + P-LAB TMS9918 Graphic Card - v4
// 4094 bytes (uses apple1_sok_8k.cfg, 7296 B budget)
// Targets REAL Apple 1 stock 8K DRAM + TMS9918 card (VRAM on card).
// 45 levels: 3 teaching + Microban I #1..#42 by D.W. Skinner (2000)
// Port by VERHILLE Arnaud, 2026
// Keyboard: W/A/S/D (QWERTY) or Z/Q/S/D (AZERTY)
// U=undo last move  R=reset level  N=next level
// Layout: LEVEL_BUF $0020 (ZP) / STATE_GRID $1F00 / Code $0280-$127D
// Requires the TMS9918 card (Hardware menu).
// Type 280R in Woz Monitor to run
